headline.en: Diagnose whether culture supports repeatable innovation
headline.zh: 诊断文化是否支持持续创新

whyOpen.en: Use this when innovation stalls because incentives, behaviors, or blockers make experimentation hard.
whyOpen.zh: 当创新因为激励、行为或阻碍因素而难以实验时使用。

audience.en: Leaders and venture teams improving the management system around innovation.
audience.zh: 适合改善创新管理系统的领导者和创新团队。

firstSteps.en: Describe observed behaviors before judging values.
firstSteps.zh: 先描述观察到的行为，再判断价值观。

firstSteps.en: Name one management system change that would make experimentation easier.
firstSteps.zh: 写出一个能让实验更容易的管理系统改变。

outcomes.en: A behavior-change backlog for making exploration measurable and repeatable.
outcomes.zh: 一份让探索可衡量、可重复的行为改变 backlog。

practicePrompts.en: Which reward currently makes teams hide uncertainty?
practicePrompts.zh: 哪种奖励机制正在让团队隐藏不确定性？

portfolio-map.en: Culture explains whether the organization can support Explore and Exploit portfolios at the same time.
portfolio-map.zh: 文化解释组织是否能同时支撑探索组合与开发组合。

experiment-canvas.en: Innovation culture should make cheap learning, evidence, and experiment cadence normal.
experiment-canvas.zh: 创新文化应该让低成本学习、证据和实验节奏成为日常。

business-model-canvas.en: Culture determines whether a new business model can be executed, protected, and scaled.
business-model-canvas.zh: 文化决定新商业模式能否被执行、保护和规模化。

description.en: Concrete facts, examples, quotes, repeated signals, or incidents.
description.zh: 具体事实、例子、原话、反复信号或事件。

description.en: What people actually do or say, not values or slogans.
description.zh: 人们实际做什么或说什么，不是价值观口号。

description.en: Formal or informal mechanisms that make good behaviors easier.
description.zh: 让好行为更容易发生的正式或非正式机制。

description.en: Formal or informal mechanisms that prevent useful behaviors.
description.zh: 阻止有用行为发生的正式或非正式机制。

description.en: Explicit leadership choices needed to cultivate the target culture.
description.zh: 培育目标文化所需的明确领导选择。
